name: Buttermilk Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, combine the sugar and flour.
2. Add the eggs to the mixture.
3. Stir in the melted margarine.
4. Mix in the buttermilk and lemon extract until well combined.
5. Pour the batter into the prepared pie shell.
6. Bake at 400°F for 30 to 35 minutes, or until the pie is set.
7. Serve the pie at room temperature.
